authorization_phrase: Authorize s19-d1 weekly relative-strength rotation availability probe + DR9 audit framework only.

contingency_tree.next_authorization: Authorize s19-d1 independent-universe weekly relative-strength rotation Tier-N spec PLAN only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13 (replication: LOCK the identical s18 mechanic; no tuning).
Authorize s19-d1 shrunk independent-universe DR9 RESULT SEALING only (drop failing names; basket must retain >= 16 names for cross-sectional ranking breadth)
contingency_tree.note: no silent substitution; a replacement name needs its own fetch+DR9

contingency_tree.next_authorization: Authorize s19-d1 independent-universe revision to an alternative large-cap shortlist (RUN_BOOK rev only)
Operator manual review / re-fetch that symbol; mark INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD; do NOT auto-progress
Operator retries Tiingo later; RUN_BOOK remains reference; one concise blocker report only

dr10_v2_reachability.expected_status: CLEARS -- weekly turnover is high (~20x, turnover branch fires alone) but cash-equity cost_drag stays well under 5% for liquid large-caps (s18 measured ~0.95%/y capital-basis); the AND-conjunction is not triggered.
dr10_v2_reachability.rule: v2 AND-conjunction (78cd22e): REJECT_FAST only if (annual_turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05)

dr9_audit_framework.per_symbol_check_procedure: Per symbol: verify CSV exists + sha vs manifest; parse date,open,high,low,close,volume; gap_continuity vs NYSE/NASDAQ calendar >=0.95; max_gap_ratio <=0.30 (calendar gaps; price jumps not gaps); quality_violation_count <=5 (dups/non-monotonic/OHLC-order/neg-vol); documented_split_event_consistency (each Tiingo-reported splitFactor ratio ~1.0 under split_only across its ex-date); roll NOT_APPLICABLE; aggregate PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD.

split_corporate_action_checks.dividend_ex_dates: higher-yield names (PM/MO-type) show small ex-div jumps (<1% of price) under split_only -> informational, not a DR9 fail (dividends not adjusted).
split_corporate_action_checks.no_forward_splits_KNOWN_in_window_for_th: To the author's knowledge none of the 24 had a FORWARD stock split in 2019-2025; the fetch's split-consistency audit VERIFIES the actual Tiingo splitFactor stream per symbol (no pre-assertion of zero).
split_corporate_action_checks.spinoff_factor_precedent: If Tiingo encodes any spin-off/special situation as a fractional splitFactor (as it did for MRK's Organon 1.048 in s17), the split_only pipeline APPLIES it and the audit verifies return-continuity (ratio within the DR9 band). Such an event is documented + verified, not a fail.
split_corporate_action_checks.splits_cross_check_match: the fetch records, per symbol, Tiingo-reported splitFactor events vs the known set (empty); any mismatch is surfaced (splits_cross_check_match=False) and resolved by the split-consistency ratio audit.

explicit_exclusions_this_turn: No vendor API call by controller
No data fetch (operator-side at a future authorization)
No DR9 RESULTS sealed (framework pre-authored only)
No mechanic change (REPLICATION of locked s18 mechanic; no tuning)
No modification of any sealed artifact
No canonical seal (RUN_BOOK, not a seal)
framework_binding: DR10 v2 AND-conjunction (78cd22e) + walk-forward K13 persistence (52a3b60) -- both bind this s19 replication candidate

k13_fold_scheme_inherited.boundaries: identical bar-index DA22 scheme as s18 (warmup 0-159; F1 160-478; F2 479-797; F3 798-1116; F4 1117-1435; F5 1436-1758) assuming the standard 1759-bar 2019-01-02..2025-12-30 calendar; re-derived, NOT searched
k13_fold_scheme_inherited.note: to be locked byte-equivalent at the s19 SEAL

k9_k13_reachability_logic.basis: The s18 weekly mechanic (R=5, top-8, 126-21) MEASURED 229 IS closed trades and 117 OOS trades (58.7/y) on a 24-name basket -> K9 aggregate CLEARS, OOS K9 >=50/y CLEARS, K13 per-fold cleared (3/5). Because s19 runs the IDENTICAL locked mechanic on a same-size (24-name) independent basket, K9/K13 reachability is EXPECTED to hold similarly.
k9_k13_reachability_logic.confirmation: K9/K13 reachability is RE-MEASURED on the s19 universe at the s19 pre-SEAL turnover measurement (signal-only, no P&L), mirroring s18; the RUN_BOOK only establishes data availability + DR9.
k9_k13_reachability_logic.k13_per_fold_requirement: the 5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED folds (identical bar-index DA22 scheme; same 2019-2025 calendar) must support enough round-trips per fold (s18 measured ~54-72/fold).
k9_k13_reachability_logic.k9_aggregate_requirement: IS closed_trades >= 100 (expected ~200-250 at weekly top-8 on 24 names).
k9_k13_reachability_logic.oos_k9_requirement: OOS >=50/y (>=100 over the 2y OOS); s18 measured ~58.7/y.

operator_side_fetch_run_book.executor: operator (TIINGO_API_KEY in env only; controller never reads/prints)

fetch_parameters.reuse_or_refetch: ALL 24 are FRESH (no reuse) -- this is an independent universe; none exist in any prior DR9-passed dir

operator_side_fetch_run_book.manifest_schema: sparta.s19.weekly_rs_rotation_independent_universe.step02b_fetch_manifest.v1 (same field structure as the s16/s17 manifests)
operator_side_fetch_run_book.post_fetch_action: Operator confirms all 24 CSVs + manifest exist, then types `Authorize s19-d1 independent-universe Tiingo split_only fetch + DR9 result sealing workflow only.`

replication_not_tuning.purpose: Answer the binding post-s18 question (LESSON_S18_D1_003/004): is the s18 edge a generalizing premium or a single-universe artifact? Independent data is the only clean test.
replication_not_tuning.statement: This is a REPLICATION of the s18 weekly mechanic on an INDEPENDENT universe -- NOT a tune, _revN_, or patch of s18. The s19 candidate (if it proceeds past DR9) will run the IDENTICAL LOCKED s18 parameters byte-equivalent: 126-21 relative-strength signal, weekly rebalance R=5, top-8 equal-weight, long-only, relative-rank exit, $100k, split_only. The ONLY change vs s18 is the UNIVERSE (24 independent large-caps). No parameter is altered, searched, or tuned. The s18 candidate (7e6aa36 SEAL / OOS_CONFIRMED P11 5dde0f7) is frozen and untouched.
replication_not_tuning.what_a_pass_would_and_would_not_mean: A positive s19 IS+K13+OOS would be CORROBORATING evidence of generalization (still DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY, still no live path). A negative/weak s19 would indicate the s18 result was universe-specific. Either way: no promotion, no FRC, no live (6-gate block permanent).

report_kind: RUN_BOOK / operator-side fetch instructions + pre-authored DR9 audit framework for an INDEPENDENT 24-name large-cap universe (zero overlap with the s17/s18 basket) to REPLICATE the OOS_CONFIRMED s18 weekly relative-strength rotation mechanic on genuinely new data (R1 of the post-s18 robustness-replication plan 50e5fcf). Purpose: test universe-generalization of the s18 edge. NOT a sealed artifact; PENDING operator-side fetch of all 24 fresh names.
scope_of_this_run_book: 24-name INDEPENDENT large-cap universe (zero overlap with s18) for replicating the s18 weekly RS mechanic; all 24 fresh
Carry the proven Tiingo split_only vendor approach
Pre-authored DR9 audit framework (same thresholds; split-consistency incl. spin-off-factor precedent)
K9 aggregate + K13 per-fold + OOS K9 reachability expectations (mechanic-driven, demonstrated by s18; re-measured pre-SEAL)
Contingency tree with a 16-name floor for ranking breadth
REPLICATION-not-tuning: locked s18 mechanic; only the universe changes
title: s19-d1 weekly relative-strength rotation INDEPENDENT-universe (24-name) availability probe + DR9 audit RUN_BOOK (NOT a SEAL; all 24 fresh Tiingo split_only; replication of the OOS_CONFIRMED s18 weekly mechanic; bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13)

universe.breadth_rationale: 24 independent large-caps across ~8 sectors give the cross-sectional RANKING breadth the relative-strength mechanic needs, matching the s18 basket size so the top-8 weekly rotation is directly comparable.
universe.independence: ZERO overlap with the s17/s18 24-name basket {AAPL,MSFT,NVDA,JPM,XOM,UNH,WMT,KO,META,AMZN,JNJ,CVX,GOOGL,V,MA,HD,PG,COST,ABBV,MRK,BAC,CAT,DIS,COP} -- verified disjoint
universe.sectors_spanned: ~8 GICS (Info Tech, Comm Services, Consumer Disc, Consumer Staples, Financials, Health Care, Energy, Industrials) -- matched to s18 for a like-for-like breadth replication

vendor.adjustment_convention: split_only (Tiingo splitFactor stream; dividends/distributions NOT adjusted; adjClose/adjVolume ignored)
vendor.api_key: TIINGO_API_KEY from env only; never printed/logged/saved
vendor.rationale: PROVEN across s14/s16/s17 fetches (pure-Python requests succeeded where yfinance curl_cffi failed TLS); same convention as the s18 universe for a like-for-like replication.
